name: huashu-doc-reviewer
description: AI document reviewer that injects comments and tracked changes directly into the original Word file. Built for One Person Companies who handle contracts, reports and confidential proposals.

displayDescription.zh: 为「一人公司」打造的 AI 审稿专家。直接在 .docx 原文里加批注气泡和追踪修订，不返回新文档、不破坏原格式。
displayDescription.en: AI reviewer that injects comments and tracked changes directly into your original .docx. No new file returned, formatting preserved.

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 用合同审查模式帮我审一下：contract.docx

quickPrompts.zh: 用合同审查模式帮我审一下：contract.docx
这份方案需要逻辑评审：proposal-v2.docx
帮我把这份报告的表述顺一遍，留修订痕迹：report.docx
quickPrompts.en: Smooth the wording of report.docx and keep all changes tracked.
